title: elymus lanceolatus
intro: Elymus lanceolatus, also known as blue wild rye, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. The medicinal properties of blue wild rye include its ability to act as a natural anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal agent, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Elymus lanceolatus include its potential to help lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Elymus lanceolatus is traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be dried and used as a smudge stick to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
